service_list.name: Custom Alumni Mobile App
service_list.brief: The Alumni App can be customised with an institution's own school and alumni network identity, colours, images and brand.

service_list.name: Admin Panel
service_list.brief: Institutions can manage, moderate, approve or reject users and modify user-generated content through an admin panel.

service_list.name: Posts
service_list.brief: Alumni and the school can share content such as photos, articles, questions and updates using hashtags.

service_list.name: Alumni Search
service_list.brief: Users can search alumni by name, class, location, industry, organisation or university.

service_list.name: Events
service_list.brief: Users can create events, invite alumni, view RSVP details and discuss events in the comments section.

service_list.name: Chat
service_list.brief: Alumni can invite people to chat, send photos, block users and create group chats.

service_list.name: Fund-Raising
service_list.brief: Institutions can create fundraising campaigns with pictures, text, links, progress tracking, one-click payments and donor lists.

service_list.name: Dashboard and Analytics
service_list.brief: Admins can track activity, popular content and user behaviour through dashboard analytics.

service_list.name: Demo App
service_list.brief: Prospective institutions can request a demo and download a demo app to experience the product.

key_messaging: Still stuck on an Alumni Website? It's time to go the APP way.
Being an Alumni Relations Company, we understand what strengthens the bond between alumni and their institution.
Launch the Alumni App to build & nourish your alumni community.
Launch it in less than 14 days
Mobile is the futuristic way to stay connected and engage effectively with audiences.

options.h1: Bring Your Alumni Community Into One Private App
options.subhead: Launch a branded alumni app for posts, events, chat, fundraising and verified member engagement in as little as 14 days.

options.h1: Stop Managing Alumni Across Scattered Channels
options.subhead: Give your school a central mobile platform where alumni can connect, update details, discover events and support campaigns.

options.h1: Your School's Alumni Network, Rebuilt For Mobile
options.subhead: The Alumni App helps institutions build a closed, branded community with admin controls, verified users and real-time engagement tools.

items.name: Custom Alumni Mobile App
items.description: Launch a private alumni app tailored to your institution's identity, including branding, colours, imagery and community settings.

items.name: Admin Panel
items.description: Give your institution control over membership, moderation and community activity from a central dashboard.

items.name: Posts
items.description: Share updates, articles, photos and questions with searchable hashtags so alumni can follow the topics that matter to them.

items.name: Alumni Search
items.description: Help alumni find one another by name, class, location, industry, organisation or university.

items.name: Events
items.description: Create alumni events, invite members, manage RSVPs and keep conversations in one place.

items.name: Chat
items.description: Support direct and group conversations with media sharing and user safety controls.

items.name: Fund-Raising
items.description: Run school, alumni or student fundraising campaigns with rich content, progress tracking, payment links and donor visibility.

items.name: Dashboard and Analytics
items.description: Understand community engagement with activity data, content performance and login behaviour.

items.name: Demo App
items.description: Let institutions experience the product before launch and move from demo to customised app in three clear steps.
The Alumni App helps institutions launch a branded private mobile app for alumni posts, search, chat, events, fundraising and admin management.
Build and nourish your alumni community with a customised mobile app featuring posts, alumni search, chat, events, fundraising and dashboard tools.
Experience The Alumni App demo and see how institutions can launch a customised alumni mobile app in three simple steps.
Find answers about The Alumni App, including launch timelines, benefits, admin tools, functionality, security and data privacy.

items: Closed network for verified alumni, students and faculty
Admin panel for moderation and approvals

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the existing core promise of a branded private alumni mobile app, the strong feature set, the 14-day launch message, demo pathway, admin controls and security/privacy assurances. Improve the site by correcting the unclear crawl/domain mismatch, modernising the dated Bootstrap-era layout, turning long feature lists into clearer conversion sections, making the demo and contact flow more prominent, adding stronger trust proof, and improving SEO metadata. The redesign matters because the current site contains useful product substance but presents it in a dated, fragmented way that may reduce confidence for schools evaluating a subscription-based alumni engagement platform.

ready_to_build_concerns: Customer URL provided as http://roofrepairgoldcoast.com/ but crawled pages are from http://thealumniapp.com/.
No Australian phone number, Australian address, ABN, QBCC or local licence details found in the scraped content.
Primary and accent colours cannot be reliably extracted from the provided scrape because CSS contents were not included.
No testimonials, founder or team information found.
Demo page includes embedded third-party content and Cloudflare challenge text in the scrape.
Some product details may need confirmation because the site appears old and uses dated dependencies.
